title: askellia lactea
intro: Askellia lactea, also known as the milk-parsley, is a flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of China. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to aid in digestion and relieve symptoms of colds and fever. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has anti-inflammatory properties, making it beneficial for reducing stress and promoting overall well-being. Askellia lactea can be used in herbal preparations such as teas and infusions, as well as in supplements, to take advantage of its health benefits.
